metadata.description: VLM benchmark CLI — run, compare, and reproduce VLM inference benchmarks. Benchmark throughput, latency, TTFT, TPOT, and VRAM usage across models and backends.

plugins.name: vlmbench
plugins.description: VLM benchmark CLI for running, comparing, and reproducing VLM inference benchmarks. Supports vLLM, Ollama, and SGLang backends with automatic platform detection, concurrency sweeps, and HuggingFace dataset integration.
